violations.text: Deli meat was observed held at 49 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC placed in freezer to cool. New Violation. Correct By: 05/05/2025

The presence of rodents are not controlled as evidenced by droppings. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 05/05/2025

The following was observed in poor repair: - Two-door cooler located in the kitchen area was not in good repair. Ambident of 49 degrees Fahrenheit was observed. PIC moved TSC items to milk cooler. - Milk cooler door gaskets were observed in poor repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/05/2025
The tile of floor and wall juncture near the 2 door cooler was observed in poor repair (broken tile). New Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2025
Empty milk cooler located in the dining area was not in good repair. (Ambient above 60 degrees F.) Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the kitchen. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2024
No person in charge was present as needed at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 03/21/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/21/2024

At the time of inspection, the following was observed in poor repair. 1. Hot Hold Unit (not operatable) 2. Steam Table (not operatable) 3. Sanitizer Dispenser (leaking) New Violation. Correct By: 04/04/2024

The following areas in poor repair... - Missing coving tile (next to refrigerator) - Ceiling ledge was observed splintering (kitchen area) The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/01/2023
